## Difficulty level

- [ ] Beginner (no prior ML knowledge required)
- [ ] Intermediate (requires Python + basic ML)
- [ ] Advanced (requires domain expertise in structural biology or deep learning)

## Does this resource require payment or a login?

- [ ] Freely available, no login required
- [ ] Free but requires account/login
- [ ] Paid / institutional access required
